name: Essence of South Vietnam: Ho Chi Minh City to Phu Quoc Escape 6 days
duration: Places:Ho Chi Minh City - Mekong Delta - Phu Quoc
highlights: Relax on the pristine beaches of Phu Quoc Island, known for its clear waters and soft white sand
Explore French colonial architecture at the Notre Dame Cathedral and the Old Post Office
Learn about the extensive underground network used by Viet Cong soldiers during the war in Cu Chi Tunnels
Take a sampan boat ride through lush waterways, surrounded by coconut trees and water palms

itinerary.title: Arrival in Ho Chi Minh City – City Half Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

BestPrice team’s tour guide warmly welcomes you at the airport, then transfers to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City for check-in. NOTE: 

In case you can not find the tour guide, please contact your travel consultant. The check-in hour is 14:00. You will be able to have an early check-in with a surcharge. Please contact your travel consultant to book the service
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Insight Mekong Delta Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 07:00 – 07:30, your journey begins with a convenient hotel pickup in Saigon before heading toward Ben Tre Province. Along the way, enjoy views of lush forests and catch glimpses of the daily lives of local people in the Mekong Delta. Upon arrival, board a scenic cruise along the Ham Luong River, one of the nine estuaries that define the delta. This tranquil ride offers the perfect chance to relax, soak in the river’s natural charm, and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere. The cruise includes a stop at a local coconut workshop, where you can watch the fascinating process of crafting tradi...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Cu Chi Half-Day – Fly to Phu Quoc
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 08:00, depart from Ho Chi Minh City for a 2-hour scenic drive to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels. Along the way, admire the tranquil countryside landscapes before arriving at this historic site. Upon arrival, begin with a short documentary that provides an overview of the tunnels’ significance during the Vietnam War. The Cu Chi Tunnels once served as a vast underground network used as living quarters, weapon storage, and a strategic base for revolutionary operations against American and South Vietnamese forces. Explore sections of the tunnels to gain a deeper appreciation of the harsh...

itinerary.title: Phu Quoc - VinWonders Combo (Ticket + Transfer)
itinerary.description: Today, enjoy a fun-filled day at VinWonders Phu Quoc, the largest theme park in Vietnam, with convenient round-trip transfer and entry tickets included. After being picked up from your hotel, head to the park where a world of excitement awaits. Discover six unique themed zones, from thrilling rides and adventurous games to fairy-tale castles and cultural shows. Families and children can enjoy water slides, aquariums, and interactive experiences, while adrenaline seekers can test their courage on extreme rides. Take time to explore the European Avenue, step into the mystical Viking Village, and...

itinerary.title: Free Day in Phu Quoc - Embrace Nature and Relax by the Beach
itinerary.description:
Enjoy your free day, relax on the beach, and indulge in a myriad of exhilarating and leisurely activities. Besides, you can also consider partaking in these suggested activities:

Sightseeing in The South – Hon Thom Island full day	$78 /pax
Phu Quoc 3 Islands Snorkeling Full Day	$44 /pax
Phu Quoc Romantic Evening - Private boat	$125 /pax

 

Day 5 Immerse In The Natural Beauty Of Phu Quoc Island

Relax At Phu Quoc Beach

itinerary.title: Farewell to Phu Quoc
itinerary.description:
Morning

Rise and shine! Let’s start a delightful morning by treating yourself to a hearty and nourishing breakfast, then please carefully organize your belongings, and savor every single last minute of your stay on this beautiful island. After that, head to the airport with one of our skilled drivers to catch your upcoming flight. Farewell and see you again!

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except overnight on train and home-stay (if any)
All transport within Vietnam, as per itinerary.
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
01 domestic flight: Ho Chi Minh – Phu Quoc
Surcharge will be applied for single traveler or single room request
